productDisplayName: Esprit Women Cascade Grey Dial Watch
description: Case style: Stainless steel case embellished with crystals, and has a fixed bezel with the leather strap looping around it for added durability and a durable, scratch-resistant mineral crystal glass on topDial style: Analog watch with a grey dial with numbered 3, 6, 9 and 12'o clock hour markings and brand name at 5 hour markingStrap style: Grey, textured, leather strap with buckle clasp closureFeatures: Quartz movement of time display, screw to reset timeWater resistant: Allows you to use it when washing handsWarranty: 2 years
